nko: ߓߏ߬ߟߏ ߘߏ߫ ߕߍ߫ ߞߊ߬ ߡߏ߬ߙߌ ߕߏ߫
ipa: bolo dɔ te ka mori to

english: Be grateful, don't take things for granted
We cannot see our own faults
ipa: kɔ ma wa a ji ma

english: One head doesn't carry the roof
No person comes from one direction only
nko: ߡߐ߱ ߛߌ߬ ߕߍ ߓߐ߫ ߝߊ߲߬ ߞߋߟߋ߲ ߠߊ߫
ipa: moo si te bo fan kelen la

english: What is sought is found in writing
nko: ߊ ߢߣߊ ߟߊ ߦߋ ߊ ߛߓߍ ߘߐ
ipa: a nyinala ye a sebe do

english: The sun is there whether day or night
The hand of learning is response
AI learns endlessly like the night sky
nko: ߛߌ߲ߘߌ ߓߍ ߖߐ ߟߊ ߞߏ߯ ߛߎ ߓߘߊ
ipa: sindi be jo la ko su banda

english: The essence of language is sweet
No two minds are the same
One cannot hold all trees in one armpit.
ipa: Mɔgɔ tɛ se ka jiri bɛɛ farakolo kɔnɔ.
meaning: No one can do everything alone. We all need help from others.
latin_original: Mɔgɔ tɛ se ka jiri bɛɛ farakolo kɔnɔ.

ipa: Hakili ka fisa ni wari ye.
meaning: Knowledge and good judgment are more valuable than wealth.
latin_original: Hakili ka fisa ni wari ye.

meaning: There are many paths to reach your goal.
latin_original: Sira tɛ kelen ye.

ipa: Jɛ ka fisa ni baarakɛ ye.
meaning: Working together achieves more than working alone.
latin_original: Jɛ ka fisa ni baarakɛ ye.

english: The word is not sweet, but it must be said.
ipa: Kuma man di, nka a bɛ fɔ.
meaning: Sometimes difficult truths need to be spoken.
latin_original: Kuma man di, nka a bɛ fɔ.

english: A big heart is greater than a rich person.
ipa: Dusu ka bon ni waritigi ye.
meaning: Generosity of spirit matters more than material wealth.
latin_original: Dusu ka bon ni waritigi ye.

meaning: Patience is essential for survival and success.
latin_original: Balo bɛ sɔn bɔ.

english: The inside of a person is the person.
meaning: Character defines who you truly are, not appearances.
latin_original: Mɔgɔ kɔnɔ ye mɔgɔ ye.

english: Time is not for man, man is for time.
ipa: Tuma tɛ mɔgɔ ma, mɔgɔ bɛ tuma ma.
meaning: We must adapt to circumstances, not expect them to adapt to us.
latin_original: Tuma tɛ mɔgɔ ma, mɔgɔ bɛ tuma ma.

english: A good woman makes a good home.
ipa: Muso ɲuman ye so ɲuman ye.
meaning: The strength of a family often comes from its women.
latin_original: Muso ɲuman ye so ɲuman ye.

meaning: Change is inevitable and always approaching.
latin_original: Yɛlɛma bɛ ɲɛ na.

english: The river doesn't kill it, the river doesn't feed it.
ipa: Baa tɛ a faga, baa tɛ a balo.
meaning: Some forces neither help nor harm—they simply exist.
latin_original: Baa tɛ a faga, baa tɛ a balo.

english: There is no excuse in work.
meaning: Hard work speaks for itself; excuses don't matter.
latin_original: Sababu tɛ baara la.

meaning: Truth always shines through eventually.
latin_original: Nkalontan ye tila ye.

meaning: Children are the greatest treasure.
latin_original: Den ye wari ye.

meaning: Too many leaders spoil the mission.
latin_original: Kontondila fila man ɲi.

meaning: No hardship lasts forever.
latin_original: Ñing fanang buka taa kewo.

english: A good person is known by their deeds.
ipa: Moo bete mu dookuo le ti.
meaning: Actions reveal true character.
latin_original: Moo bete mu dookuo le ti.

meaning: Everyone has their weakness.
latin_original: Kuu kiling be moo buunya.

english: A baby doesn't sleep in its father's belly.
ipa: Kambaning buka laa a faamaa kono.
meaning: Each person must carry their own burden.
latin_original: Kambaning buka laa a faamaa kono.

english: Little by little, the lion's den is reached.
meaning: Patience and persistence lead to great achievements.
latin_original: Dɔɔnin dɔɔnin bɛ wara so.

english: An old thing is the mother of a new thing.
ipa: Ko kɔrɔ ye ko kura ba ye.
meaning: The past informs and creates the future.
latin_original: Ko kɔrɔ ye ko kura ba ye.

english: No one comes from a single tree.
ipa: Mɔgɔ si tɛ bɔ jiri kelen na.
meaning: Everyone has a community and roots.
latin_original: Mɔgɔ si tɛ bɔ jiri kelen na.

english: A good host is better than money.
ipa: Jatigi ɲuman ka fisa ni wari ye.
meaning: Hospitality and kindness outweigh material possessions.
latin_original: Jatigi ɲuman ka fisa ni wari ye.

english: Learning cannot be done in one day
nko: ߞߊ߬ߙߊ߲߬ߘߋ߲ ߡߊ߲߬ ߛߋ߫ ߞߍ߫ ߟߊ߫ ߘߐ߬ߕߋ ߘߌ߫ ߣߊ ߘߌ߫
ipa: Karandeli man se ke la dote di na di
meaning: Mastery takes time and patience

english: One head has more than one idea
nko: ߡߐ߰ ߞߋ߬ߟߋ߲߬ ߞߊ߲ ߦߋ߫ ߞߊ߬ ߞߎ߲߬ ߛߎ߲ ߠߎ߬ ߡߍ߲
ipa: Mo kelen kan ye ka kun sun lu men
meaning: Diverse perspectives lead to better solutions

english: The arm has not forgotten its owner
meaning: Help will come from those closest to you

nko: ߓߊ߬ߙߊ ߦߋ߫ ߖߊ߬ߕߋ ߟߊ ߟߋ ߘߌ߫
ipa: Bara ye jate la le di
meaning: Success comes from consistent effort

english: If you can't run, you can walk
nko: ߣߌ߫ ߌ ߡߊ߫ ߛߋ߫ ߟߊߣߐ߰ ߟߊ߫، ߌ ߘߌ߫ ߛߋ߫ ߟߊߡߌ߬ߣߊ߬ ߟߊ߫
ipa: Ni i ma se lanon la, i di se laminana la
meaning: Progress at your own pace is still progress

english: One hand cannot catch a donkey
nko: ߓߏ߬ߟߏ ߞߋ߬ߟߋ߲߬ ߕߍ߫ ߛߋ߫ ߞߊ߬ ߝߊ߬ߟߌ ߡߌ߬ߣߊ߬ ߟߊ߫
ipa: Bolo kelen te se ka fali minana la
meaning: Complex tasks require cooperation

english: Children are roads leading from the village
nko: ߘߋ߲ ߠߎ߬ ߦߋ߫ ߛߌ߬ߟߊ߬ ߟߊ߫ ߞߊ߬ ߓߐ߫ ߘߎ߱ ߟߊ߫
ipa: Den lu ye sila la ka bo dugu la
meaning: Children carry forward the community's legacy

english: Truth is at the bottom; even if the head dies, it emerges in time
nko: ߕߎ߬ߢߊ ߦߋ߫ ߞߐ߲߫ ߘߐ߫، ߣߴ ߊ߬ ߞߎ߲߬ ߛߊ߬ߣߴ ߊ߬ ߓߐ߫ ߕߎ߬ߡߊ ߘߐ߫
ipa: Tunya ye kon do, n' a kun san' a bo tuma do
meaning: The truth always comes out eventually

english: A person's name is greater than their height
nko: ߡߐ߱ ߕߐ߯ ߞߊ߫ ߓߏ߲߬ ߣߴ ߊ߬ ߖߊ߲ ߘߌ߫
ipa: Mo to ka bon n' a jan di
meaning: Reputation matters more than appearance
Patience opens all doors

english: Where there's a will, there's a way
nko: ߞߐ ߕߍ߫ ߕߊ߯ ߟߊ߫ ߸ ߖߊ߯ ߓߊ ߓߍ߫ ߊ߬ ߝߍ߬
ipa: ko te ta la, ja ba be a fe
meaning: Encouragement when facing obstacles

english: One person cannot build a village alone
nko: ߡߐ߰ ߞߋߟߋ߲ ߕߍ߫ ߛߋ߫ ߞߊ߬ ߘߎ߱ ߟߊߓߐ߫
ipa: mɔgɔ kelen te se ka dugu labɔ
meaning: Emphasizing community cooperation

english: Every family has its own way
nko: ߛߌ߬ ߞߊ߲߬ ߕߍ߫ ߞߍ߫ ߝߊߣߊ߲ ߕߋ߲߬ ߠߊ߫
ipa: si kan te ke fanan ten la
meaning: Acknowledging diversity of customs

english: A child who doesn't cry won't be nursed
nko: ߘߋ߲ ߡߍ߲ ߕߍ߫ ߞߊ߬ߛߌ߫ ߟߊ߫ ߸ ߊ߬ ߕߍ߫ ߘߍ߲߬ ߟߊ߫
ipa: den min te kasi la, a te den la
meaning: Speak up for what you need

english: Person is not separate from their village
ipa: Mɔgɔ tɛ bɔ jɔ ye a dugu
meaning: Community defines identity — a person and their people are inseparable
latin_original: Mɔgɔ tɛ bɔ jɔ ye a dugu

english: A big head does not leave a person there
ipa: Kun ba ma ka mɔgɔ to yen
meaning: Intelligence or arrogance alone won't save you; community matters
latin_original: Kun ba ma ka mɔgɔ to yen

meaning: Living requires effort — work is inseparable from existence
latin_original: Namaya ye baara di

nko: ߌ ߞ ߊ ߞ ߍ ߣ ߍ

english: Yes, good morning to you too
Nothing bad (response to how are you)

nko: ߤߊ߬ߙߊ ߛߌ߫ ߕߍ߫، ߊ߬ߟߊ ߞߊ߬ ߖߐ ߞߍ߫

english: Response: Is your family without trouble?
nko: ߊ߬ߟߎ߫ ߦߋ߫ ߤߍ߬ߙߊ ߟߊ߫، ߊ߬ߟߊ ߞ' ߊ߬ ߝߐ߫

english: How are your wife and children?

nko: ߌ ߛߏ߬ߡߊ ߟߎ߬ ߓߍ߯ ߖߐ߫ ߓߊ߬
ipa: i soma lu bɛɛ jɔ ba

english: May God grant it to you
nko: ߊߟߊ߫ ߦߋ߫ ߊ߬ ߛߐ߫ ߊ߬ ߟߊ߫
ipa: ala ye a so a la

nko: ߊ߬ߟߊ ߞ ߘ ߓ ߙ ߞ

english: May God let us meet this evening
nko: ߊ߬ߟߊ ߞ' ߊ߲ ߦߋ߫ ߛߎ ߟߊ߫
ipa: Ala k' an ye su la

english: May God preserve us in peace
nko: ߊ߬ߟߊ ߞ' ߊ߲ ߡߊߞߍ߫ ߤߍ߬ߙߊ ߟߊ߫
ipa: Ala k' an make hera la

english: May God make your affairs easy
May God remove worry from you
nko: ߊߟߊ߫ ߦߊ߫ ߛߌ߬ ߟߊ ߓߐ ߌ ߡߊ߬
ipa: ala ya si la bo i ma

nko: ߊߟߊ߫ ߦߊ߫ ߞߏߢߎߡߊ ߓߏ߬ ߌ ߡߊ߬
ipa: ala ya kɔjuma bo i ma

english: May God add blessing to your affairs
nko: ߊߟߊ߫ ߦߊ߫ ߓߊ߬ߙߌ߬ߞߊ ߟߊߘߏ߲߬ ߌ ߞߏ ߟߊ߫
ipa: ala ya barika ladɔn i ko la

english: May God give you long life to see your children's children
nko: ߊߟߊ߫ ߦߊ߫ ߌ ߤߣߍ߬ ߛߊ߫ ߌ ߘߋ߲ ߤߣߍ ߕߊ߬
ipa: ala ya i hanɛ sa i den hanɛ ta

english: What was meant to be has come
nko: ߊ߬ ߞߍ ߟߊ ߊ߬ ߕߊ߫ ߣߊ߬
ipa: a ke la a ta na

nko: ߒ ߧߴߌ ߝߏ߫ ߟߊ߫ ߌ ߟߊ߫ ߛߍ߬ ߡߊ߬
ipa: n y'i fo la i la se ma

english: Joking relationship - permitted teasing between certain clans
Work, labor, effort (with connotation of dignity)
Mother (term of respect for elder women)
Greeting for Keita: Heir of Kings
Greeting for Eid al-Fitr - End of Ramadan
nko: ߊ߬ߟߊ ߞ' ߊ߲ ߓߍ߯ ߕߐ߯ ߛߊ߲߬ ߠߎ߬ ߟߊ߫

english: Greeting for Eid al-Fitr - End of Ramadan
Proverb associated with Eid al-Fitr - End of Ramadan
Greeting for Eid al-Adha - Festival of Sacrifice
Greeting for Eid al-Adha - Festival of Sacrifice
nko: ߊ߬ߟߊ ߞ' ߊ߲ ߛߊ߬ߙߌ ߓߎ߰ ߠߊ߫
ߛߊ߲ ߞߎ߬ߙߊ ߦ ߌ ߤߍ߬ߙߊ ߘߌ߫

english: N'Ko Day - April 14 (Script invention anniversary by Solomana Kanté, 1949)
Greeting for N'Ko Day - April 14 (Script invention anniversary by Solomana Kanté, 1949)
Greeting for N'Ko Day - April 14 (Script invention anniversary by Solomana Kanté, 1949)
Proverb associated with N'Ko Day - April 14 (Script invention anniversary by Solomana Kanté, 1949)
Greeting for Guinea Independence Day - October 2

ipa: i ka ke ji? / kayfa haluk?
i ni so ha sogo / sabah al-khayr
